race.comment: PLAYING QUEST (4) led and won two back at Pinjarra before a fair effort at Bunbury last time out. He's since trialled at Lark Hill and has switched to the Dellar stable. Will need some luck from the barrier, though his recent figures show that he's good enough. SWEXAN (9) disappointed last start after a good win two back over 1400m at this track. Dropping to 1200m doesn't look an issue and the claim of O'Donnell comes in handy with the aid of an inside barrier. Can put his best foot forward. HOT PUDDIN (7) did his best work late to finish third at long odds at his latest appearance at this track over 1200m. Good signs last time and cannot be dismissed. SHOOTING KONTIKI (2) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1200m at this track, beaten 1.5 lengths into fourth. Likely improver with strong top-three prospects. DENVER AFFAIR (6) has to be included on the back of a strong win last time out.
